prestazioni: Engine swap to a 1NZ-FE (1.5L) with a custom forced-induction setup using a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger, paired with a Tomei 260° camshaft kit and HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold for optimized turbo spool and flow dynamics. The fuel system is upgraded with a Walbro 255 LPH fuel pump and ID1000x injectors to support 300+ hp at 1.5 bar boost.

Chassis reinforcement via a Cusco bolt-in roll cage (Type-HS) and custom subframe stiffening plates to handle increased power delivery, combined with a KAAZ 1.5-way limited-slip differential (LSD) for improved traction under hard acceleration.

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (height-adjustable, 8kg/mm front and 6kg/mm rear springs) and Whiteline adjustable rear sway bars (22mm) to reduce body roll, paired with D2 Racing front strut tower braces for enhanced chassis rigidity.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny P-Body widebody kit (FRP construction) with custom fender flares to accommodate 17x9.5 ET0 Volk TE37SL wheels wrapped in 215/40R17 Yokohama ADVAN Neova AD08R tires for aggressive stance and grip.

Custom carbon fiber hood (Seibon) with a functional central vent to aid in heat extraction from the turbocharged 1NZ-FE, paired with a Veilside rear diffuser and custom side skirts for aerodynamic balance.

Interior stripped and reupholstered with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back), a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel, and a custom aluminum shift knob (for manual swap), with a full custom roll cage (Cusco) wrapped in Alcantara for weight reduction and driver engagement.
